personal.preferred_title: Principal Data Engineer | PySpark, Data Lake & Enterprise Data Platforms

summary: Principal/Senior Data Engineer with deep enterprise experience building governed, analytics-ready data platforms using Python, SQL, PySpark, AWS, and data lake patterns. Experienced designing reusable ETL pipelines, telemetry-scale processing frameworks, data quality controls, reporting layers, and operational standards in regulated financial services environments. Strong background translating product and stakeholder requirements into scalable data solutions that support analytics, forecasting, governance, and executive decision-making.

experience.title: Senior Capacity & Data Engineer
bullets: Built Python/Pandas ETL pipelines ingesting telemetry from 6,000+ endpoints, transforming large operational datasets into governed, analytics-ready reporting layers.
Designed AWS-based data workflows using S3 landing zones, AWS Glue ETL, Athena, and Redshift to support scalable data processing, forecasting, and executive analytics.
Developed PySpark and parallel processing workflows for large-scale telemetry transformation, reporting, and capacity forecasting use cases.
Implemented data quality, validation, cleansing, and reconciliation practices across telemetry pipelines to improve trust in downstream analytics and operational reporting.
Created dimensional and historical reporting structures for capacity analysis, trend detection, seasonal risk forecasting, and stakeholder decision support.
Partnered with infrastructure, application, and operations teams to define requirements, troubleshoot data issues, and deliver reliable data products in a regulated banking environment.

experience.title: Performance Engineer
bullets: Managed Dynatrace AppMon and Synthetic Monitoring for critical hospitality systems, providing operational telemetry for reliability and performance analysis.
Led the FAST project, data-mining real-user performance metrics from Gomez Synthetic Monitoring to identify optimization opportunities adopted by engineering teams.
Supported AWS migration planning by assessing monitoring readiness, data collection needs, and operational reporting gaps across production systems.

experience.title: SME for CA APM (Senior Consultant)
bullets: Managed enterprise CA APM environments supporting 4,000–6,000 instrumented agents and 50+ Enterprise Managers across distributed systems.
Designed dashboards, alerts, thresholds, and operational reporting standards adopted across client environments.
Built Perl/Ksh automation scripts for recurring telemetry extraction and performance reporting, replacing manual weekly export processes.
Delivered technical documentation, knowledge transfer, and client training for monitoring standards and operational support teams.

education.degree: High Diploma / Post-Graduate Diploma in Computer Engineering Technology / Computer Science
Bachelor of Science in Civil Engineering

skills.Languages: Python, SQL, Perl, Ksh / Korn Shell Scripting, Java, C++
skills.Data Engineering: ETL/ELT, PySpark, Apache Spark, Data Pipelines, Data Lake Architecture, Data Warehousing, Dimensional Modeling, Data Quality, Pipeline Validation
skills.Cloud & Platforms: AWS S3, AWS Glue, Athena, Redshift, EC2, ECS, Hive/Hadoop, Linux/Unix
skills.Governance & Reliability: Data Governance, Data Security, Access Controls, Validation, Reconciliation, Operational Reporting, Documentation, Agile Delivery
skills.Analytics & AI: Capacity Forecasting, Prophet, scikit-learn, Telemetry Analysis, BI/ML-Supporting Data Products
skills.Tools & Infra: Airflow, Docker, Git, Streamlit, BMC TrueSight / TSCO, CA APM / Introscope, AppDynamics, Dynatrace
skills.Learning / Exposure: Databricks, Delta Lake, Unity Catalog, Delta Live Tables, Snowflake, dbt, Kafka

projects.name: HorizonScale — AI Capacity Forecasting Engine
projects.description: Built a Python/PySpark forecasting pipeline that transformed enterprise telemetry into governed analytics and predictive capacity insights. Reduced forecasting cycles by 90% and surfaced infrastructure bottleneck predictions through Streamlit dashboards.

projects.name: Serverless Lakehouse Platform (AWS)
projects.description: Designed an AWS-based lakehouse platform using S3, Glue, Athena, PySpark, and Parquet for scalable ETL processing, analytics-ready datasets, and optimized reporting access patterns.

projects.name: AI-Powered Job Search Pipeline
projects.description: Built an agentic data workflow using Python, FAISS, sentence-transformers, Claude Code, and Grok/xAI API to score jobs, detect semantic duplicates, generate tailored documents, run quality gates, and track application status.
